# HideZero

HideZero is a Google Sheets add-on that hides zeros non-destructively. It makes zero values appear blank without deleting or modifying the underlying data. Users can restore zeros at any time with one click.

## What it does

- Hides zeros across an entire Google Sheets worksheet with one click
- Can target a specific cell range or multi-range selection
- Fully reversible — zeros can be shown again instantly
- Non-destructive — only the display format changes, never the cell value
- Works with both static values and formula results that produce zero

## How it works

HideZero uses Google Sheets' built-in 4-section number format (`positive;negative;zero;text`). It sets the zero section to blank, making zeros invisible while leaving all values intact.

## Pricing

One-time purchase of $4.90 USD. Available on the Google Workspace Marketplace.

## Links

- Homepage: https://hidezero.meteor.co.il/
- Install: https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/app/hidezero_for_google_sheets/114517382322
- Support: https://hidezero.meteor.co.il/support.html
- Privacy Policy: https://hidezero.meteor.co.il/privacy.html
